description: Write the static systemd unit file `scripts/fuse-watchdog.service` to the repository. It must include `Environment=` lines for all four variables actually consumed by the script — `FUSE_CONN_DIR`, `FUSE_WAITING_THRESHOLD`, `FUSE_POLL_INTERVAL`, and `DRY_RUN` — and invoke the watchdog with `ExecStart=... fuse-watchdog --one-shot` (Type=oneshot) so it pairs correctly with a companion timer. The file should follow the style of `deploy/systemd/acc-server.service` and `deploy/acc-repo-sync.service`.
title: Create scripts/fuse-watchdog.service with correct Environment= directives
